headlines.title: Iran War Live Updates: Attacks in Gulf Threaten to Reignite Conflict
headlines.summary: U.S. warships shot down missiles and drones aimed at ships the Navy was guiding through the Strait of Hormuz, and the authorities in the United Arab Emirates blamed Iran for a drone attack.

headlines.title: With World Distracted by Iran War, Israeli Settlers Intensify Attacks in West Bank
headlines.summary: Israel has failed to arrest a wave of violence against Palestinians, prompting military officials to urge the government to intervene.

headlines.title: How the Kremlin Lures Africans Into Russia’s War in Ukraine
headlines.summary: A growing number of men across the continent say they are being promised jobs in Russia, only to be forced into the war. Some go as mercenaries, but many more are drawn unwittingly.

headlines.title: After the Hong Kong Fire Killed 3 Generations of His Family, A Son Searches for Justice
headlines.summary: Lee Chun Ho lost four members of his household in last November’s apartment-tower blaze. He’s now telling an investigative committee what contractors ignored.

headlines.title: Drone Hits a Moscow High-Rise Days Before a Major Military Parade
headlines.summary: Air defenses in the Russian capital were breached as Ukraine expands long-range strikes.

See the looks from the 2026 Met Gala red carpet
headlines.summary: Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.

headlines.title: Hotels have a big World Cup problem: Bookings are running far below projections
headlines.summary: Nearly 80% of hotels surveyed by a body representing the industry reported bookings were running below projections — a worrisome sign with only weeks to go before the World Cup.

headlines.title: Modi's party takes control of India's West Bengal in key state election
headlines.summary: The outcome is expected to strengthen Modi's political position midway through his third term.

headlines.title: Here are the 2026 Pulitzer Prize winners
headlines.summary: Award winners include authors Daniel Kraus, Jill Lepore and Yiyun Li, opinion writer M. Gessen and staffers and contributors at The Washington Post , Reuters and AP.

headlines.title: A United jet struck a light pole and a truck near Newark airport, police say
headlines.summary: New Jersey State Police say a United Airlines passenger jet struck a light pole and damaged a truck as it was coming in for a landing at Newark Liberty International Airport on Sunday.

headlines.title: Japanese PM reaffirms intention to revise Constitution
headlines.summary: TOKYO -- Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, on Sunday, the country's Constitution Memorial Day, reaffirmed her intention to revise the Constitution, local media reported.

headlines.title: US May Day rallies draw tens of thousands nationwide
headlines.summary: NEW YORK -- Tens of thousands of people took to the streets across the United States on Friday to join May Day rallies against the US-Israeli war on Iran and defend labor and immigrant rights.

headlines.title: BP criticized over surging profits following Iran war
headlines.summary: The United Kingdom-based oil and gas giant BP is facing criticism after reporting its profits more than doubled in the first quarter of the year, following a spike in oil prices since the Iran war began.

headlines.title: UAE exits oil groupings, eyes more output
headlines.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to substantially ramp up its oil production capacity after quitting the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and the broader OPEC+ alliance effective Friday, making a pivotal shift at a time when the war between the United States, Israel and Iran has triggered an energy crisis and roiled the global economy.

headlines.title: 7 OPEC+ countries to increase oil production
headlines.summary: VIENNA -- OPEC said in a communique on Sunday that seven OPEC+ countries decided to increase their oil production cap by 188,000 barrels per day in June, in response to the withdrawal of the United Arab Emirates from the bloc.

headlines.title: Assembly Election 2026 results LIVE: TN, Kerala, West Bengal head into Govt formation mode
headlines.summary: Follow live updates from The Hindu as fresh developments unfold following the historic 2026 Assembly elections results in Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Kerala, Puducherry, and Assam

headlines.title: Das Adam Smith Problem: rethinking Smith’s moral and economic worlds
headlines.summary: Explore the Das Adam Smith Problem, revealing the coherence between Smith’s moral philosophy and economic theories amidst ongoing scholarly debate.

headlines.title: Did the Prime Minister’s broadcast violate MCC? | Explained
headlines.summary: Explore whether Prime Minister Modi's broadcast breached the Model Code of Conduct and the implications for electoral law.

headlines.title: What the winner must learn from the loser in Kerala: No leader is inevitable
headlines.summary: The LDF’s campaign, like its government, was strikingly at odds with Left tradition and revolved around Pinarayi’s personality; the UDF must now resist the temptation to imitate this model

headlines.title: SC seeks Centre’s response on Christian Michel James’ plea in AgustaWestland case
headlines.summary: Supreme Court seeks Centre's response on Christian Michel James' plea for release in AgustaWestland case due to maximum sentence claim.
